method: Batch 126-145: twenty distinct architectures plus 146 integration
note: This batch avoids parameter-only variants. Each numbered model uses a different architecture family or modeling assumption.

architecture_map.137: Random Fourier feature kernel residual model
architecture_map.145: Rule-based mixture of heterogeneous architecture outputs
